sections.paragraph: πραιτώριον, ου, τό [Lat. loanword] ‘headquarters of a provincial governor’, the praetorium Mt 27:27; Mk 15:16; J 18:28, 33; 19:9; Ac 23:35. Since the site of Paul’s detention is uncertain, it is not clear whether in Phil 1:13 π. refers to Herod’s residence or to the praetorian guard in Rome.
